title: Agent Memory Systems Advance with Hierarchical Architectures
summary: Multiple research teams have converged on hierarchical memory architectures for AI agents, separating working, episodic, and semantic memory stores to maintain context over long-horizon tasks.
why_it_matters: Long-context memory is a key bottleneck for deploying agents on complex, multi-step tasks. Hierarchical memory could unlock a new class of reliable agentic applications.
